case_title: JUDITH BALDOZ et al VS. VANESSA BUMANGLAG et al

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS VANESSA BUMANGLAG, VICTOR BUMANGLAG, MELANIE BUMANGLAG, LA SALETTE HOMES LTD. AND SAMPAGUITA LTD.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE TENTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND OVERRULED AS TO ALL OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFFS ARE GRANTED LEAVE TO PLEAD FACTS, IF THEY CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, SHOWING THEY REQUESTED A REASONABLE ACCOMMODATION. ALL CAUSES OF ACTION OTHER THAN THE TENTH ARE ADEQUATELY PLED. NONE OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS UNDER THE CONTINUING VIOLATION DOCTRINE, WHICH PERMITS RECOVERY "FOR ACTIONS THAT TAKE PLACE OUTSIDE THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD IF THESE ACTIONS ARE SUFFICIENTLY LINKED TO UNLAWFUL CONDUCT WITHIN THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD [.]" (RICHARDS V. CH2M HILL, INC. (2001) 26 CAL.4TH 798, 812). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2012 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAMSEY HANAFI OF KUMIN SOMMERS LLP, TEL. NO. 434-4500 APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT;
ATTY. ANGELINE O'DONNELL OF O'LEARY, WOOD & ROBBINS, LLP, TEL. NO. 742-1710 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; CROSS DEFENDANTS JUDITH BALDOZ AND CHARLIE BORBE'S DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THE QUANTUM MERUIT CLAIM IS PROPERLY PLED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Continued To Aug-01-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-15-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANGELINE O'DONNELL OF O'LEARY WOOD & ROBBINS LLP, TEL. NO. 742-1710 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS VANESSA BUMANGLAG, VICTOR BUMANGLAG, MELANIE BUMANGLAG, LA SALETTE HOMES LTD. AND SAMPAGUITA LTD.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Sustained with ten days leave to amend as to the tenth cause of action and overruled as to all other causes of action. Plaintiffs are granted leave to plead facts, if they can do so in good faith, showing they requested a reasonable accommodation. All causes of action other than the tenth are adequately pled. None of the causes of action are barred by the statute of limitations under the continuing violation doctrine, which permits recovery "for actions that take place outside the limitations period if these actions are sufficiently linked to unlawful conduct within the limitations period [.]" (Richards v. CH2M Hill, Inc. (2001) 26 Cal.4th 798, 812). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Not reported. = (302/HEK)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-20-2012 Off Calendar
